prompt: Act as a professional YouTube thumbnail designer. Create a high-CTR thumbnail concept for a video titled [VIDEO TITLE]. Include bold colors, emotional facial expressions, and short text overlays.

prompt: Create an Instagram image concept for a post about [TOPIC]. Include layout ideas, color palette, and text overlay suggestions.

title: Shock Style Thumbnail

title: Business Plan Builder
preview: Generate a comprehensive, investor-ready business plan for any idea.
prompt: Act as an experienced startup advisor and business strategist who has helped launch 50+ successful companies. Create a comprehensive business plan for the idea I describe. Include: Executive Summary (the hook for investors), Problem Statement (pain point being solved), Solution & Value Proposition, Target Market & Customer Personas (with market size data), Competitive Landscape & Differentiation, Revenue Model & Pricing Strategy, Go-to-Market Strategy (first 90 days), Operations Plan, Financial Projections (Year 1-3, with assumptions), Funding Requirements & Use of Funds, and Key Risks & Mitigation Strategies. Make it realistic, specific, and compelling. Business idea: [DESCRIBE YOUR BUSINESS IDEA]

title: LinkedIn Post Writer
preview: Create scroll-stopping LinkedIn posts that build your personal brand and drive engagement.
prompt: Act as a LinkedIn content strategist who specializes in personal branding for executives and entrepreneurs. Write a high-performing LinkedIn post based on my input. The post must: open with a pattern-interrupt first line (no 'I'm excited to share'), tell a story or share an insight that provides genuine value, use short paragraphs (1-3 lines max) for mobile readability, include a relatable moment of failure, learning, or surprise, end with a thought-provoking question to drive comments, and use strategic white space. Aim for 150-300 words. Write 2 versions: one personal story angle, one bold opinion/contrarian take. My topic or experience: [DESCRIBE WHAT YOU WANT TO POST ABOUT]

title: Python Code Generator
preview: Generate clean, well-documented Python code for any task or automation.
prompt: Act as a senior Python developer with expertise in writing clean, efficient, production-ready code. Write Python code to accomplish the task I describe. Requirements: follow PEP 8 style guidelines, include detailed docstrings for all functions, add type hints throughout, handle edge cases and errors gracefully with try/except blocks, include comments explaining non-obvious logic, write it to be easily testable and maintainable, and add 3-5 example test cases at the bottom. After the code, provide a brief explanation of the approach, any libraries required, and how to run it. Task: [DESCRIBE WHAT YOU WANT THE CODE TO DO]

title: Lesson Plan Creator
preview: Build detailed, engaging lesson plans for any subject and grade level.
prompt: Act as an experienced curriculum designer and master teacher with expertise in pedagogy and differentiated instruction. Create a detailed lesson plan for the subject, grade level, and duration I specify. Include: Learning Objectives (specific, measurable), Materials & Resources needed, Warm-Up Activity (5-10 min, activates prior knowledge), Direct Instruction section with key talking points, Guided Practice activity with teacher support, Independent Practice with differentiation for advanced and struggling learners, Formative Assessment strategy, Closure Activity to consolidate learning, Homework or extension task, and Accommodations for ELL students and IEP/504 learners. Subject: [SUBJECT] | Grade: [GRADE LEVEL] | Duration: [CLASS LENGTH]

title: YouTube Thumbnail Concept Generator
preview: Get proven thumbnail concepts designed to maximize click-through rate.
prompt: Act as a YouTube growth strategist and visual designer who has optimized thumbnails for channels with millions of subscribers. Generate 5 thumbnail concepts for my video topic that will maximize click-through rate. For each concept provide: a detailed description of the visual layout, the facial expression or emotion to convey (if showing a person), the text overlay (max 4-6 words, high contrast), the color palette and why it works, the psychological trigger it uses (curiosity gap, fear, desire, etc.), and a description of the background or setting. Also give me the single best concept and explain why it would outperform the others. Video topic: [YOUR VIDEO TOPIC AND TARGET AUDIENCE]

title: SQL Query Generator
preview: Generate optimized SQL queries for any database task or analytical question.
prompt: Act as a senior database engineer and SQL expert with deep knowledge of query optimization, indexing strategies, and data modeling. Write a SQL query to accomplish the task I describe. Provide: the complete SQL query with proper formatting and indentation, inline comments explaining complex parts, an explanation of the logic and approach, any indexes that should exist for optimal performance, alternative approaches if relevant, and notes on compatibility (MySQL / PostgreSQL / SQLite differences if applicable). Also identify potential issues like N+1 problems, full table scans, or missing WHERE clauses. Database schema or context: [DESCRIBE YOUR TABLES AND COLUMNS] | Task: [WHAT DO YOU WANT TO QUERY]

title: Email Newsletter Writer
preview: Craft compelling newsletters your subscribers will actually read and look forward to.
prompt: Act as a world-class newsletter writer who has built audiences of 100,000+ subscribers from scratch. Write a high-quality newsletter edition based on my topic and audience. Structure it with: a subject line and preview text optimized for open rates, a compelling personal opening that draws the reader in, the main content section (educational, entertaining, or both), 2-3 curated resources or recommendations with short commentary, a signature insight or quote to end with, and a clear single call-to-action. Tone should be conversational, smart, and never boring. Match the personality to the niche I describe. Newsletter topic/niche: [YOUR TOPIC] | Target audience: [DESCRIBE YOUR READERS] | This edition's main theme: [MAIN TOPIC OR STORY]
